title: Vaccination
description: Administration of vaccines to protect animals against common infectious diseases.

title: Parasite Control
description: Prescription and administration of parasite prevention products to protect animals from fleas.

title: Pet Grooming
description: Dental examinations to assess oral health, teeth cleaning, and treatment of dental problems.

title: Diagnostic Testing
description: Laboratory tests including blood tests, urinalysis, fecal analysis, and imaging (X-rays, ultrasound).
